title: Makiko Izawa

infobox.key: [Authority control databases](/wiki/Help:Authority_control "Help:Authority control"): People [Edit this at Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q33020989#identifiers "Edit this at Wikidata")

infobox.value: This biographical article about a Japanese sprinter is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Makiko_Izawa&action=edit).

(伊沢 まき子, *Izawa Makiko*; born 15 August 1946) is a Japanese [sprinter](/wiki/Sprint_(running) "Sprint (running)"). She competed in the [women's 200 metres](/wiki/Athletics_at_the_1964_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_200_metres "Athletics at the 1964 Summer Olympics – Women's 200 metres") at the [1964 Summer Olympics](/wiki/1964_Summer_Olympics "1964 Summer Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-SportsRef-1)

Evans, Hilary; Gjerde, Arild; Heijmans, Jeroen; [Mallon, Bill](/wiki/Bill_Mallon "Bill Mallon"); et al. ["Makiko Izawa Olympic Results"](https://web.archive.org/web/20200417211502/https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/iz/makiko-izawa-1.html). *Olympics at Sports-Reference.com*. [Sports Reference LLC](/wiki/Sports_Reference "Sports Reference"). Archived from [the original](https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/iz/makiko-izawa-1.html) on 17 April 2020. Retrieved 13 July 2017.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Japanese sprinter

Makiko Izawa

| Personal information | |
| --- | --- |
| Nationality | Japanese |
| Born | (1946-08-15) 15 August 1946 (age 79) |
| Sport | |
| Sport | Sprinting |
| Event | 200 metres |

**Makiko Izawa** (伊沢 まき子, *Izawa Makiko*; born 15 August 1946) is a Japanese [sprinter](/wiki/Sprint_(running) "Sprint (running)"). She competed in the [women's 200 metres](/wiki/Athletics_at_the_1964_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_200_metres "Athletics at the 1964 Summer Olympics – Women's 200 metres") at the [1964 Summer Olympics](/wiki/1964_Summer_Olympics "1964 Summer Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-SportsRef-1)
